content.heading: The Brief
content.body: The boardroom is where decisions are made and first impressions are formed. For this regional bank, an inherited boardroom that no longer reflected the organisation's current standing needed to be rebuilt — not just redecorated — from the floor up.

content.caption: The custom twelve-seat table in solid engineered stone with integrated power and AV management.

items.heading: Technology Integration
items.body: All AV and conferencing technology is fully concealed within the table and wall cavities. The room transitions from presentation mode to deliberation mode with a single panel command — screens lower, blinds adjust, and lighting shifts automatically.

items.heading: Materiality
items.body: Walls clad in large-format fluted acoustic panels in deep navy, a ceiling coffered to reduce echo, and a feature wall in hand-applied lime plaster. The material choices are quiet but unmistakably considered.

content.heading: Outcome
content.body: Completed in eight weeks to an active timeline. The client used the boardroom for a major investor presentation within days of handover. Feedback was that the room “said everything before anyone spoke.”
